## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? One or two sentences. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Build / tooling / installers

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. "Closes #123". -->

## How I tested it

<!-- Commands you ran and what you observed. handoff is a TUI, so include a quick
     manual check (launch `handoff`, exercise the change) when it touches the UI. -->

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Ran the app (`npm run dev`) and verified the change by hand (if user-facing)

## Checklist

- [ ] The change stays **local-first** — no new network calls or cloud usage without an explicit, consented gate.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or absolute personal paths committed (logs/output redacted).
- [ ] Docs updated (`docs/`, `README.md`) if behavior, commands, or config changed.
- [ ] Follows the existing code style; no new dependencies unless discussed.

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything worth calling out: trade-offs, follow-ups, screenshots of the TUI, etc. -->
